claim_boundary: This confirmation evaluates whether transform-exact MOSAIC replicates its post-outcome exploratory advantage over the registered capacity-transfer certificate on untouched real-data seeds, under a fixed release protocol and external benchmark diagnostics. It does not establish that a natural external split belongs to the theorem's structured shift class, does not confer clinical safety, and does not turn an unestimable external contract into evidence of safety.

Camelyon17-WILDS.known_external_limitation: required source-label strata are absent from the external center split

frontier.selection: Separately for each registered certificate variant, among candidates satisfying both privacy and utility certificates choose the smallest certified worst source-label conditional error; break exact ties by candidate key. Abstain if none pass.

data_protocol.tokenizer: balanced logistic task score trained only on construction data, discretized at construction-score quartiles
data_protocol.certification_sampling: equal count per represented source-label stratum
data_protocol.external_sampling: equal count per represented source-label stratum when possible; otherwise preserve represented support and mark missing strata

reporting.all_candidates: Report both certificate variants for every candidate and seed, including every solver check, selection, external diagnostic, failure, and abstention.
reporting.uncertainty: Report exact two-sided 95% binomial intervals for seed-level deployment and external-safety rates; report seed-level values and medians with ranges for continuous metrics.
reporting.external_diagnostic: External benchmark safety is a diagnostic only. Missing required strata are unestimable, not safe.
reporting.negative_results: Waterbirds, CivilComments, Camelyon17, and GaitPDB remain in the report even if all seeds abstain or external evaluation is unsupported.

pass_conditions.complete_execution: All 25 dataset-seed runs contain exactly 13 candidates from pinned official implementations, with no proxy or optimization-error row.
pass_conditions.receipt_replay: An independent audit performs 650 global optimization replays and recomputes every radius, privacy certificate, utility certificate, deployment decision, selection, external risk, and false-acceptance label with zero mismatch.
pass_conditions.pointwise_dominance: Transform-exact certification is no worse than capacity transfer on every one of the 325 paired candidate tables.
pass_conditions.strict_improvement_replication: Transform-exact certification strictly improves at least 100 of 325 paired objectives; this target was fixed after observing 133 of 325 improvements on seeds 100-104.
pass_conditions.additional_safe_deployment: Transform-exact certification adds at least one selected deployment over capacity transfer and that selected deployment satisfies the estimable external diagnostic; this target was fixed after two Waterbirds crossings on seeds 102-103.
pass_conditions.positive_usefulness: Transform-exact MOSAIC deploys on BiasBios-Clinical on at least 4 of 5 confirmation seeds and every estimable selected deployment satisfies the external diagnostic contract.
pass_conditions.empirical_safety: There are zero false acceptances among all transform-exact selected deployments whose external privacy and utility are estimable.
pass_conditions.support_discipline: Every missing external source-label stratum is reported as unestimable; no such row is counted as safe or unsafe.
pass_conditions.modality_coverage: The complete report includes vision, medical vision, text, and time-series feature stores.
pass_conditions.claim_discipline: No real benchmark result is described as proving membership in the structured shift class.

stopping_rule: Run every registered dataset and seed. No outcome-based seed replacement, dataset replacement, threshold change, candidate change, or early stopping is permitted.

pilot_exclusion.use: Seeds 0-4 selected the original protocol. The post-outcome transform-exact analysis on seeds 100-104 motivated the registered replication targets. None of those rows enters this fresh confirmation's estimates or intervals.
